Widen timing assertions in driver report tests to fix flaky CI failures (#1287)

The upper bounds on driver setup/teardown duration assertions were too
tight (0.2-0.3s), causing intermittent failures on slow CI runners
(especially Windows). Widened to 1.0s which still validates reasonable
timing while accommodating CI variability.

commit.message:
feat: fill all 24 traits by mapping O*NET abilities to 5 missing aptitude traits

The Analyze PRW function was only filling 19/24 traits because spatial
perception, form perception, clerical perception, eye-hand-foot coordination,
and color discrimination had no data source. These traits now pull from O*NET
abilities data (Spatial Orientation, Visualization, Perceptual Speed, Multilimb
Coordination, Visual Color Discrimination) with level values mapped from 0-7
to the 0-4 trait scale.

fix: Instagram webhook — processar entry do Page ID (mensagens inbound)

Meta envia 2 webhooks separados para cada DM: um com o IG account ID
(que só contém outbound echoes) e outro com o Page ID (que contém as
mensagens inbound reais). O segundo webhook era ignorado por não casar
com nenhum ID armazenado.

- Adiciona coluna ig_page_id à instagram_instances
- Auto-descoberta nível 2: detecta e armazena o Page ID automaticamente
- Inclui ig_page_id no lookup do webhook para processar ambas entries

commit.message:
feat: merge agentic-rag-pipeline into ai-voice-agent

Upgrades the RAG layer from basic (top-4 chunks → LLM) to production-grade
agentic RAG with self-correction and hallucination detection.

New capabilities:
- Hybrid retrieval: BM25 keyword search + vector embeddings via RRF fusion
- Document grading: GPT-4o-mini evaluates each retrieved chunk for relevance
- Query reformulation: auto-retries with rewritten query if docs are poor
- Hallucination checker: post-generation confidence score (0.0–1.0)
- Full pipeline trace: every step logged and exposed to frontend + LangSmith

Architecture changes:
- New app/ package: agent.py, grader.py, reformulator.py,
  hallucination_checker.py, hybrid_retrieval.py, vector_store.py,
  voice_handler.py, guardrails.py, prompts.py
- main.py replaces app.py as entry point
- Procfile updated to main:app
- requirements.txt adds rank-bm25
- index.html: confidence bar, grounded badge, source badges, pipeline trace UI

Voice I/O (Whisper STT + TTS Nova) and frontend UX unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix dynamic connection starvation — new WS connections never started

_run_manager() loop called asyncio.wait(tasks, FIRST_COMPLETED) with
no timeout. _run_connection tasks run forever (stagger → connect →
infinite receive loop), so asyncio.wait blocked indefinitely. New
connections added dynamically via register_listener() (e.g., leader
monitor enabling auto-copy) were added to self._connections but never
got _run_connection tasks — the loop never re-scanned.

Fix: add timeout=10 to asyncio.wait so the loop wakes every 10s to
discover new connections. This is why leader 177 showed "Disconnected"
despite being registered — its SharedConnection existed but never
had a _run_connection task created for it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add HOST_INBOUND_GRE for tunnel termination

GRE tunnel interfaces (gr-X/X/X) require the outer GRE protocol
(IP proto 47) to be allowed as host-inbound traffic on the zone
where the tunnel source address lives. Without this, the XDP
pipeline drops outer GRE packets before the kernel can decapsulate
them, making the tunnel deaf.

Add HOST_INBOUND_GRE (bit 21) to the host-inbound flags bitmap
and map GRE protocol 47 in host_inbound_flag() — same pattern as
ESP (proto 50) for IPsec. Users configure it with:

  set security zones security-zone <zone> host-inbound-traffic
      system-services gre

Implemented in eBPF, DPDK, and Go dataplane layers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add pinn-mechanics-researcher Claude skill

Expert-level Claude Code skill for PINN-based solid mechanics research
in the style of WaiChing Sun's group at Columbia. Covers:

- Schwarz alternating method with multi-chart atlas on complex 3D geometry
- Jacobian pullback for PDE residuals through chart decoders
- Inverse material identification from DIC full-field data
- Neural network constitutive models (ICNN, GENERIC, yield surface)
- DIC format loaders: Vic-3D, GOM ARAMIS, DICe, ncorr, MatchID, ISTRA 4D
- Autonomous benchmark/regression test suite (pytest + MMS)
- Debugging convergence in multi-chart PINN training

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Tighten buy/sell point rules to reduce false positives

- 三买: add upper price cap p <= ZG*1.20 (opportunity still fresh)
- 二买: add upper price cap p <= ZG*1.15, require p >= ZD (not just any pullback)
- 一买: tighten divergence threshold 0.85 → 0.75 (require stronger contraction)

Reduces hit rate from ~33% to a more actionable set.
Known good signals (600603, 300736, 600426, 688141, 002733) still triggered.
601001 correctly filtered out as price already 18% above ZG.

commit.message:
Fix stale token + add fill detection diagnostics for leader monitor

- Refresh access_token from SharedConnection on reconnect — tokens
  expire every 85min, listener was using original token for REST API
  symbol resolution, causing silent 401 → fill silently dropped
- Add throttled message counter (30s intervals) so we can see if the
  listener is receiving ANY data from the shared WS connection
- Upgrade "No enabled followers" log from DEBUG to INFO — was invisible
  in production, making it impossible to tell if fills were detected
- Add HTTP status logging on _resolve_symbol failure (was silent on 401)

fix: auto-updater now waits for app exit before launching installer

causing race conditions. Now uses a 2-second delayed cmd.exe launch
so the app fully exits before the installer starts.
